hook: Your mattress doubles in weight every 8 years
fact_headline: The Hidden Weight in Your Bedroom
caption:
Did you know your mattress can double in weight over 8 years? That extra weight comes from dead skin cells, dust mites, sweat, and allergens building up deep in the fibres. Regular vacuuming only scratches the surface.

This is why deep cleaning matters. Our team uses professional-grade equipment to extract what household tools simply can't reach. Better sleep starts with a truly clean space 🛏️

If it's been a while since your home had a proper refresh, we handle this for you.

👉 Link in bio to book your deep clean.
